/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc ../libgrammars.a CMakeFiles/grammars.dir/parser_driver.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/grammars.dir/ntexture.lexer.c.obj CMakeFiles/grammars.dir/decorate.lexer.c.obj CMakeFiles/grammars.dir/ntexture.parser.c.obj CMakeFiles/grammars.dir/decorate.parser.c.obj
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ranlib ../libgrammars.a
